hints.Ne: 'Ne' is a negative particle used with subjunctive prohibitions
hints.Maria: 'Maria' is a proper noun, the name Mary
hints.noli: 'Noli' does not appear in this sentence

steps.reveal: timeas = you may fear / do not fear (subjunctive prohibition)

hints.present indicative: Present indicative would be 'times'; 'timeas' with the -ea- is subjunctive
hints.imperfect: Imperfect would be 'timebas'; 'timeas' is present subjunctive
hints.future: Future would be 'timebis'; 'timeas' is present subjunctive

hints.teneo, tenere, tenui, tentum: These are the principal parts of 'teneo' (to hold)
hints.video, videre, vidi, visum: These are the principal parts of 'video' (to see)
hints.moneo, monere, monui, monitum: These are the principal parts of 'moneo' (to warn)

hints.nominative: Mary is being directly addressed, not acting as the subject of the verb
hints.accusative: Accusative would indicate Mary as the object, but she is being addressed
hints.ablative: Ablative would indicate means or location, but Mary is being addressed

hints.2nd declension: 2nd declension nouns typically end in -us or -um; 'Maria' ends in -a
hints.3rd declension: 3rd declension nouns have -is in the genitive; 'Maria' follows the -a pattern
hints.indeclinable: 'Maria' does decline: Maria, Mariae, Mariae, Mariam, Maria
